constraints.name: warnInactiveTemplate
constraints.messageTemplate: Proposal template '{name}' is inactive and will not appear for new proposals

constraints.name: warnExtremePoints
constraints.messageTemplate: Scoring rule '{ruleName}' has extreme point value ({points}); verify this is intentional

constraints.name: warnUnlinkedDocument
constraints.messageTemplate: Document '{name}' is not linked to any entity

value.value: Cannot update a deleted scoring rule
Cannot activate a deleted scoring rule
Cannot deactivate a deleted scoring rule
Document must be in parsing status to mark as parsed
Document must be in parsing status to mark as failed

policies.name: SalesCanManageProposalTemplates
policies.message: Sales staff can manage proposal templates

policies.name: ManagerCanActivateProposalTemplates
policies.message: Only managers can activate or deactivate proposal templates

policies.name: SalesCanManageInteractionAttachments
policies.message: Sales staff can manage interaction attachments

policies.name: ManagerCanManageScoringRules
policies.message: Only managers can manage CRM scoring rules

policies.name: ManagerCanManageReports
policies.message: Managers and analysts can manage reports

policies.name: StaffCanManageChatThreads
policies.message: Staff can manage admin chat threads
